problem: Why does quantum superposition collapse — can decoherence be prevented at scale?
mechanism: Electromagnetic induction in moving biological tissue
hypothesis: If Electromagnetic induction in moving biological tissue is applied to prevented, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Calorimetric measurement with 9 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
